title: Loki’s Past Deepens
description: On pages 2–4, this part follows Usopp, King Harald, Unknown person #1, Loki, Unknown person #2, Zoro as The story turns toward Elbaf’s past, Loki, Rocks, Harald, and the ancient grudges shaping the island’s present conflict.
scene: The story turns toward Elbaf’s past, Loki, Rocks, Harald, and the ancient grudges shaping the island’s present conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: This is Elbaf, but...

dialogue.speaker: King Harald
dialogue.text: ...Pops AINT HERE.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He's on a voyage!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're all puny humans??? This is the first I've ever seen one moving around for real.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Rocks the legendary pirate came to Elbaf... but why?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Aha ha! How cute! <3

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hang on!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Loki has been seriously hurt; you've got to return to Elbaf at once!!"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm guessin' he can still be reached even if he's away, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What's yer name?

dialogue.speaker: Loki
dialogue.text: Loki.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Alright, lol, just do what I tell ya.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: head on home and get someone to send urgent word to your pops. Tell em' to say:

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Watch your mouth!! Do I look like I take orders from a human?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You seriously expect my father to drop everything...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: ...just 'cause I'm hurt?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah. Right! Besides. Someone as weak-looking as you has no right to boss me around!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Rocks' swordsmanship was renowned...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...for its brutal impact akin to a giant hammer or cannon fire.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It was said to blow every- thing in the surrounding vicinity away.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: YaaaaAA ArRGH!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Voha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha! There we have it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: LOK! has been seriously hurt!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Harald's path crossed with this mad man once before...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It happened during the reverie that year...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Someone attacked and kidnapped five of the kings?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: unbelievable!! That big man in black has to be the culprit!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The lives of those sovereigns...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ...cannot be used to extort Mu.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: No kidding, but it threw...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...the holy land into total chaos, didn't it?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The incident would be the first and last of its kind.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: An intruder made it all the way to the flower room, hidden deep within the holy land.

summary: This part advances the Elbaf’s Buried History through 33 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
